mainTitle: How do you like to be called?
subtitle: Let's get to know you better!
phoneSubtitle: Input an active number used on this phone. For BNI customers, use the number registered with BNI.
otpSubtitle: We'll send the 6 digits secret code to [PHONE].
otpSecurityPoint1: You can choose to receive OTP via SMS or WhatsApp. We recommend you to choose SMS because it's safer.
otpSecurityPoint2: If you prefer using WhatsApp, make your WhatsApp verification more secure by enabling PIN (Settings > Account > Two-Step Verification).
otpSecurityPoint3: Don't ever share OTP with anyone!
otpVerifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit OTP code that was sent to [PHONE].
securityNoticeText: Never share your payment password with anyone. Our staff will never ask for your password.
otpErrorMessage: The OTP code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
paymentPasswordErrorMessage: The payment password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
successMessage: Your account has been verified successfully.
successDescription: You can now proceed to make withdrawals.
failedMessage: We were unable to verify your account.
failedDescription: Please check your credentials and try again.
maintenanceMessage: The system is currently under maintenance.
maintenanceDescription: Please try again later. We apologize for the inconvenience.
